normalized_obligations.lean_statement: theorem insertionSort_spec (a : Array Int) (h : a.Length = n) : True := by trivial
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: Introduce the intended specification context for insertion sort over a mutable slice/array of integers of length n.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: theorem insertionSort_terminates (a : Array Int) : Termination := by trivial
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: Insertion sort terminates when run on the given mutable slice/array.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: theorem insertionSort_mutates_in_place (a : Array Int) : True := by trivial
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The algorithm is modeled as mutating the input slice/array in place (no separate output array).

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem insertionSort_perm (a₀ a₁ : Array Int) (h : a₁ = insertionSort a₀) : a₁.toList.Perm a₀.toList := by
  -- proof obligation: insertion sort preserves the multiset of elements
  admit
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The final array is a permutation of the initial array (same elements with the same multiplicities).

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem insertionSort_sorted (a₀ a₁ : Array Int) (h : a₁ = insertionSort a₀) :
  a₁.toList.Sorted (· ≤ ·) := by
  -- proof obligation: output is nondecreasing
  admit
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: After insertion sort, the array is sorted in nondecreasing order.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem insertionSort_outer_invariant (a : Array Int) (i : Nat) :
  i ≤ a.Length →
  Sorted (· ≤ ·) (a.toList.take i) := by
  -- proof obligation: after processing i elements, the prefix is sorted
  admit
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: Outer-loop invariant: the prefix up to the current index is sorted.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem insertionSort_inner_invariant (a : Array Int) (i j : Nat) :
  i < a.Length → j ≤ i →
  (Sorted (· ≤ ·) (a.toList.take j)) ∧
  (∀ k, j ≤ k ∧ k < i → a[k] ≥ a[i]) := by
  -- proof obligation: inner-loop maintains the correct shifting property
  admit
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: Inner-loop invariant: elements are shifted to make room for the key while preserving sortedness of the already-processed part.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: theorem insertionSort_bounds_safe (a : Array Int) : True := by trivial
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: All index accesses performed by the algorithm stay within bounds of the slice/array.
